seed_instruction: Write an email asking for information on how to get a copy of medical records for my father from their facility from 2002.
org_constraint: The email should specify the purpose of obtaining the records.
new_constraint: The email should not specify the request's purpose or mention why the records are needed.
instruction: Write an email asking for information on how to get a copy of medical records for my father from their facility from 2002. The email should specify the purpose of obtaining the records. The email should not specify the request's purpose or mention why the records are needed.
response:
Subject: Request for Medical Records - [Father's Full Name] - DOB: [Father's Date of Birth]

Dear [Name of Medical Records Department or Facility Contact Person, if known, otherwise use a general title like "Medical Records Department"],

I am writing to formally request a copy of the medical records for my father, [Father's Full Name], who was a patient at your facility. His date of birth is [Father's Date of Birth].

I am specifically requesting records from the year 2002.

Please let me know the necessary procedures, forms, and any associated fees required to obtain these records. I would appreciate information regarding the timeframe for processing this request.

Thank you for your time and assistance with this matter. I look forward to hearing from you soon regarding the next steps.

Sincerely,

[Your Full Name]
[Your Phone Number]
[Your Email Address]
[Your Relationship to Patient, e.g., Son/Daughter]<turn|>
